name: Apple-Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix semisweet chocolate pieces, half jar of marshmallow fluff, peanut butter, and vanilla in a bowl. Set aside.
2. In a heavy 2-quart saucepan, mix sugar and apple juice.
3. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves and the mixture boils.
4. Continue cooking until the candy thermometer reaches 240°F or the mixture reaches the soft-ball stage, stirring frequently.
5. Remove from heat and quickly add the marshmallow mixture.
6. Stir until just combined.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square baking pan.
8. If desired, top with chopped peanuts.
9. Allow to cool completely.
10. Cut into squares. Makes 3 dozen 1-1/2 inch pieces.
